appointments.title: Dog annual vaccine (Óctuple/Séxtuple + Rabies)
appointments.description: Annual booster for core vaccines, leptospirosis, and mandatory rabies according to Chilean regulations.

appointments.title: Dog ectoparasite control (pour-on/spray)
appointments.description: Control mensual de pulgas y garrapatas con pipeta (pour-on) o spray.

appointments.title: Dog ectoparasite collar replacement check
appointments.description: Collar antiparasitario con revisión/reemplazo semestral (cada 6 meses).
